memoryArtifacts.headline: A Brief History
memoryArtifacts.description: JOHN de CLAYTON was the eldest son, born about 1240, and acquired the Manor. He married another Ruth Latham, a first cousin. They had two sons, Thomas and Ralph. John died in 1280.

popularStory.headline: A Brief History
popularStory.description: JOHN de CLAYTON was the eldest son, born about 1240, and acquired the Manor. He married another Ruth Latham, a first cousin. They had two sons, Thomas and Ralph. John died in 1280.

zh.lifeSummary: 當John de Clayton II於1230年出生在英國藍卡爾克雷頓 勒 伍茲時，他的父親Thomas de Clayton I20歲，母親Ruth de Latham21歲。他於1263年與Ruth de Latham在英國藍卡爾利藍德結婚。他們至少是8個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世在他的家鄉。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Clayton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of numerous places, in Yorkshire, Lancashire, Staffordshire, and Sussex, named Clayton, from Old English clǣg ‘clay’ + tūn ‘enclosure, settlement’.

variants.name: Cleeton
meanings: English (Shropshire and Worcestershire): variant of   Clayton  .

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When John de Clayton II was born in 1230, in Clayton Le Woods, Lancashire, England, his father, Thomas de Clayton I, was 20 and his mother, Ruth de Latham, was 21. He married Ruth de Latham in 1263, in Leyland, Lancashire, England. They were the parents of at least 8 sons and 2 daughters. He died in his hometown.

Il a épousé Ruth de Latham en 1263, à Leyland, Lancashire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 8 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé dans sa ville natale.

ja.lifeSummary: John de Clayton IIが1230年にイギリスランカシュアイアクレイトン ル ウッドスで生まれた時，父Thomas de Clayton Iは20歳，母Ruth de Lathamは21歳であった。1263年にイギリスランカシュアイアリーランドでRuth de Lathamと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも8人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は故郷で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: John de Clayton II(이)가 1230년 영국 랭카실르 클레이턴 일 우드즈에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas de Clayton I(은)는 20세였고, 그의 어머니 Ruth de Latham(은)는 21세였다. 그는 1263년 영국 랭카실르 리랜드에서 Ruth de Latham(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여덟 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 그의 고향에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John de Clayton II nasceu em 1230, em Clayton Le Woods, Lancashire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Thomas de Clayton I, tinha 20 anos e sua mãe, Ruth de Latham, tinha 21 anos. Ele casou-se com Ruth de Latham em 1263, em Leyland, Lancashire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 8 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em sua cidade natal.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John de Clayton II родился в 1230 г. в местности клеитон л вудс, ланкашир, Англия, его отцу по имени Thomas de Clayton I было 20 лет, а матери, которую звали Ruth de Latham, 21. Он женился на женщине по имени Ruth de Latham в 1263 г. в местности лиланд, ланкашир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 8 сыновей и 2 дочери. Он умер в его родном городе.
